string.text: what they did for a living before they decided to cross the perimeter.
if they have anyone waiting for them back on the outside.
what the very first thing they plan to buy is if they ever strike it rich and leave the Zone.
whether they believe the Zone is expanding or if the scientists are just trying to scare us.
which faction they think has the right idea about how to handle the Zone.
about the most terrifying thing they have ever seen in the dark.
if they think the 'Wish Granter' is a real thing or just a campfire fairy tale for rookies.
what their favorite piece of gear is and why they trust it so much.
if they ever miss the sound of rain on a regular tin roof instead of the constant threat of a psy-storm.
whether they prefer the reliability of an old AK or the precision of those fancy Western rifles.
how they managed to survive their very first night in the Zone.
if they believe that some mutants, like the Snorks, still have a tiny bit of humanity left in them.
what the most 'normal' thing they miss from the outside world is.
if they've ever had a dream that felt like the Zone was trying to tell them something.
whether they trust the traders like Sidorovich, or if they think they're all just leeches.
what they would do if they found a 'Goldfish' artifact tomorrow morning.
if they think the Military is actually trying to protect the world, or if they're just legalized bandits.
about the first person they met when they entered the Zone.
how many times they've come close to 'losing it' out here in the wasteland.
if they think the Monolithians are brainwashed or if they've actually seen something we haven't.
which mutant they hate fighting the most.
whether they believe the Zone has a 'center' that controls everything.
what kind of music they used to listen to before they came here.
if they've ever had to leave a friend behind to save their own skin.
how they keep their boots from rotting off in these radioactive swamps.
if they think it's possible to ever truly 'tame' the Zone.
what they think about the stories regarding the 'Oasis'.
if they remember the last time they saw a clear blue sky without a hint of smog or radiation.
whether they think Freedom's idea of a 'free Zone' would actually work or just lead to chaos.
what the best piece of advice a veteran stalker ever gave them was.
if they've ever found a stash that felt like it belonged to someone they knew.
about the most expensive thing they've ever sold to a trader.
if they think the 'Brain Scorcher' was a natural phenomenon or a man-made nightmare.
how they feel about the Ecologists and their constant poking at things that should be left alone.
if they have a 'lucky' routine they do before heading out on a long excursion.
what they would name their own bar if they ever decided to hang up the rifle and settle down.
if they think we're all just slow-walking ghosts waiting for our time to come.
about the time they were most tempted to just pack up and walk back toward the perimeter.
whether they think artifacts are a gift to humanity or a curse in disguise.
if they've ever heard the 'voices' people talk about when they get too close to the Red Forest.
what they think the 'Great Emission' actually changed in the Zone.
if they think the Bandits are getting more organized lately.
how they stay focused when they've been sitting in a bush for six hours waiting for a target.
if they believe there are parts of the Zone that haven't been mapped yet.
what their opinion is on the 'Mercs' and who might be funding them.
if they've ever found a piece of pre-1986 history while scavenging in the ruins.
how they deal with the constant hunger when supplies run low.
if they think they'll ever see their old home again.
what the weirdest anomaly they've ever blundered into was.
if they think the Zone 'remembers' the people who die here.
whether they'd rather face a pack of blind dogs or a single, hungry Bloodsucker.
if they think the world outside even cares what happens to us in here.
about the first time they ever used a bolt to find a path through a field of anomalies.
if they've ever seen a 'Poltergeist' and lived to tell the story.
what their 'comfort food' in the Zone is, if such a thing even exists.
if they think the legends about Strelok are true.
whether they believe in 'luck', or if survival is just 100% preparation.
what the most useless item they've ever seen a rookie carry into the Zone was.
if they think the Zone is a punishment for something humanity did wrong.
how they sleep at night knowing that an emission could hit at any moment.
if they've ever seen those 'ghost' artifacts that supposedly disappear if you look at them too long.
what their first kill in the Zone felt like.
if they think the 'Clear Sky' faction actually know more than they let on.
how they think the Zone will look ten years from now.
if they've ever heard of a stalker who managed to strike it rich in the Zone and make it out alive.
whether they think Duty's discipline is necessary for survival or just a way to control people.
what the most 'human' thing they've seen a mutant do is.
if they think the 'Black Market' prices for artifacts are finally starting to drop.
how they manage to keep their weapon from jamming in all this dirt and grime.
if they've ever found a location in the Zone that actually felt peaceful for a few minutes.
what they think about the 'Pseudo-giants' and where something that big even finds enough to eat.
if they think we're all just 'bugs under a magnifying glass' for some higher power.
about the worst weather they've ever had to hike through.
if they believe that some stalkers can 'talk' to the anomalies.
what they miss most about the city they grew up in.
if they heard the rumours that 'Controller' mutants used to be people who were experimented on in the underground labs.
whether the spatial anomalies found in the Zone might be portals to other worlds, and whether they've ever entered one.
what their go-to story is when they're sitting around a campfire with strangers.
if they've ever had to eat something they couldn't identify just to stay alive.
how they feel about the 'Zombie' stalkers - is killing them mercy or murder?
if they think there's such a thing as a 'good' person left in the Zone.
about the most beautiful thing they've seen out here, despite all the death.
if they think the 'Blueprints' for advanced gear are actually being leaked by the Military.
what they would do if they woke up tomorrow and the perimeter was gone.
if they think the Zone chooses who gets to stay and who has to die - and what one might need to do to gain her favour.
how they feel about the 'Renegades' and why anyone would choose to live like that.
if they've ever found a stash that they were too afraid to actually open.
what their opinion on 'Artifact Hunting' as a career is versus just being a hired gun.
if they think we're all just becoming part of the Zone ourselves, bit by bit.
if they ever worry about their family on the outside.
if they believe in any 'Zone ghosts' that aren't just mutants or anomalies.
about the time they were most glad to have a medkit on their belt.
if they think the 'C-Consciousness' is just a myth or a terrifying reality.
what they would say to someone who was thinking about crossing the perimeter for the first time.
if they think the 'Dark Valley' is actually cursed or just a hotspot for Bandits.
how they feel about the 'Loners' and why we don't just all team up.
if theyve ever seen a 'Burer' and if so how they managed to keep hold of their weapon.
what they think the scientists are actually doing with all those artifacts they're buying.
if they think the 'Radioactive Bread' stories are just a prank played on rookies.
how they keep their sanity when the 'Whispers' start after three days without sleep.
if they think the Zone is the most dangerous place on Earth, or if the 'real' world is worse.
what their favorite 'stalker legend' is.
if they believe there's a way to shut the Zone down for good.
about the last time they had a meal that wasn't out of a can.
if they think the 'Flesh' mutants are actually as pathetic as they look.
how they think their life would have turned out if they'd never heard of the Zone.
if they watched the last fight in Arnie's arena in Rostok.
what they think about the 'Pripyat' urban legends.
if they think we'll ever find out what actually caused the second Chernobyl NPP explosion.
whether they believe that some artifacts can actually talk to you.
